opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I've been pinching my nose for almost an hour, but the blood just keeps pouring down the back of my throat and making me sick.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The nosebleed started on its own about an hour ago and won't stop no matter how hard I squeeze — I'm swallowing a lot of blood and starting to feel faint.

symptom_narrative.onset: came on by itself about an hour ago, nothing set it off
symptom_narrative.duration: about an hour and still going
symptom_narrative.character: heavy, steady bleeding from the right nostril with blood also running down the back of my throat
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst nosebleed I've ever had — it's soaked several towels
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: mostly the right side of my nose, and I can feel it dripping down my throat
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant since it started, not letting up
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing — I've been pinching the soft part of my nose hard for about 45 minutes and it hasn't helped
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it keeps coming no matter what I do; leaning back makes me swallow more of it
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I feel lightheaded and a bit sick, I was sick once bringing up swallowed blood, and I've coughed up some clots into a bowl
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I get the odd small nosebleed but never anything like this
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm just sitting forward on a chair holding a towel to my face, I don't feel safe to move around

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: at home with my spouse, who is here with me and helping

objective_data_offered.value: a continuous trickle of dark blood from the right nostril; the patient looks pale and sweaty and is leaning forward over a towel
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: appearance over a video call only — not a clinician examination

objective_data_offered.value: spouse says he has been spitting large blood clots into a basin and there are several blood-soaked towels on the floor
spouse says he looks pale and clammy and keeps saying he feels lightheaded
